_description: Playwright/Chromium: browser binaries and Linux deps for E2E + Playwright/Chrome DevTools MCP
_bootstrap: echo 'Installing Playwright Chromium and system dependencies...'
if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --ignore-scripts; fi
if [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/playwright ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/playwright install --with-deps chromium; else npx -y playwright@latest install --with-deps chromium; fi
